ocr.text: The study evaluated various parameters across two groups, with the Intervention group (before) showing a Weight of
51.93±10.24 kg, which increased to 53.41±10.49 kg after intervention, yielding a P value of 0.021, while the Control group
(before) had a Weight of 52.13±11.59 kg, decreasing slightly to 51.96±11.37 kg after, with a P value of 0.714. For BMI, the
Intervention group (before) recorded 17.81±3.32 kg/m2 rising to 18.41±3.52 kg/m2 after, with a P value of 0.034, compared to
the Control group (before) at 18.13±4.83 kg/m2 remaining unchanged afterwards at 18.13±3.93 kg/m2, P value 0.668. MUAC
was 25.25±2.33 cm (before) to 25.30±2.32 cm (after) in the Intervention group (P value 0.852), while the Control group
(before) had 24.45±2.12 cm decreasing slightly to 24.41±2.08 cm (after) with a P value of 0.486. SFT remained constant at
9.98±0.41 cm in the Intervention group (P value 0.982) and changed from 9.99±0.64 cm to 10.00±0.66 cm in the Control group
(P value 0.326). S. Protein increased from 6.35±0.55 g/dL (before) to 6.50±0.54 g/dL (after) in the Intervention group (P value
0.177), while the Control group saw a decrease from 6.14±0.43 g/dL to 6.10±0.37 g/dL (P value 0.232).
Parameters  Intervention group (before)  Intervention group (after)  P value  Control group (before)  Control group (after)  P value
FEV 1% improved from 52.87±9.48% to 55.84±13.04% in the Intervention group (P value 0.095), while the Control group
(before) had 50.31±13.73% to 51.90±14.17% (P value 0.147). The FVC shifted from 73.61±11.60% (before) to 76.07±14.75%
(after) in the Intervention group (P value 0.771), while the Control group changed from 71.58±13.36% to 73.01±13.89% (P
value 0.142). FEV1/FVC showed minor improvement in the Intervention group from 69.44±7.88% to 70.57±8.53% (P value
0.433), whereas the Control group improved from 64.62±7.88% to 67.59±10.10% (P value 0.006). The 6MWT (m) significantly
increased from 301.00±19.13 m to 322.16±20.83 m in the Intervention group (P value 0.001), while the Control group (before)
recorded 297.16±16.90 m to 299.16±14.13 m (P value 0.541). Lastly, the HRQL improved from 112.13±4.05 to 134.80±6.41 in
the Intervention group (P value 0.001), and from 109.60±5.28 to 112.16±4.84 in the Control group (P value 0.007).
